reviews.comment:
Baños exelentes , café de primera y lo mejor e imperdible los sandwiches de bondiola o de jamón crudo , " UNICOS "

(Translated by Google)
Excellent bathrooms, first-class coffee, and the best and unmissable are the pork shoulder or raw ham sandwiches, "UNIQUE."

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy completo para descansar de un viaje Largo, cargar gasolina y comer algo.

(Translated by Google)
A very complete place to rest after a long trip, refuel and eat something.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMk1uWWR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar, pero muy sucio. No cambian las sábanas ni limpian los baños. Cuando nos ibamos vimos a la señora que venia a limpiar (sin ningun producto de limpieza) Le preguntamos con que desinfestaban y me dijo que no le daban nada. Solo "agua y trapito" Una pena. La gente muy amable, la estrella es para ellos.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, but very dirty. They don't change the sheets or clean the bathrooms. When we were leaving, we saw the cleaning lady (without any cleaning products). We asked her what they used to disinfect, and she said they didn't give her anything. Just "water and a rag." A shame. The staff were very friendly; the star goes to them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNnRlMGd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Las medialunas crudas. La gente muy buena pero las instalaciones quedaron viejas y absoletas. Todo muy sucio. Era un lugar hermoso hace unos años

(Translated by Google)
The raw croissants. The people were very nice, but the facilities were old and outdated. Everything was very dirty. It was a beautiful place a few years ago.
